title: dryopteris standishii
intro: Dryopteris standishii, also known as the Standish's wood fern, is a species of fern native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Dryopteris standishii plant are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
